base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_palette_cyan — a ui (logo) from 1980 pac man. Cyan-tinted font variant — used for BASHFUL/KIMAGURE Inky-ghost label in attract-mode. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cyan-tinted font variant — used for BASHFUL/KIMAGURE Inky-ghost label in attract-mode
